mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article ( id, author_id, title, content_text, content_storage_type, content_object_key, content_url, content_format, content_preview, cover_object_key, cover_url, status, like_count, favorite_count, summary_status, summary_text, summary_version, summary_retry_count, summary_last_error, published_at, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{contentText}, #{contentStorageType}, #{contentObjectKey}, #{contentUrl}, #{contentFormat}, #{contentPreview}, #{coverObjectKey}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{summaryStatus}, #{summaryText}, #{summaryVersion}, #{summaryRetryCount}, #{summaryLastError}, #{publishedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id, title, content_text, content_storage_type, content_object_key, content_url, content_format, content_preview, cover_object_key, cover_url, status, like_count, favorite_count, summary_status, summary_text, summary_version, summary_retry_count, summary_last_error, published_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM article WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.content_text, a.content_storage_type, a.content_object_key, a.content_url, a.content_format, a.content_preview, a.cover_url, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.summary_status, a.summary_text, a.created_at, a.updated_at, up.nickname AS author_nickname, up.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url FROM article a LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = a.author_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.status = 1

SELECT a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.content_text, a.content_storage_type, a.content_object_key, a.content_url, a.content_format, a.content_preview, a.cover_url, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.summary_status, a.summary_text, a.created_at, a.updated_at, up.nickname AS author_nickname, up.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url FROM article a LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = a.author_id WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.id IN
#{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.status = 1
AND a.author_id = #{authorId}

SELECT a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.content_text, a.content_storage_type, a.content_object_key, a.content_url, a.content_format, a.content_preview, a.cover_url, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.summary_status, a.summary_text, a.created_at, a.updated_at, up.nickname AS author_nickname, up.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url FROM article_like al INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = al.article_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = a.author_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 1 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY al.updated_at DESC, al.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like al INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = al.article_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 1 AND a.status = 1

SELECT a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.content_text, a.content_storage_type, a.content_object_key, a.content_url, a.content_format, a.content_preview, a.cover_url, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.summary_status, a.summary_text, a.created_at, a.updated_at, up.nickname AS author_nickname, up.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url FROM article_favorite af INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = af.article_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = a.author_id WHERE af.user_id = #{userId} AND af.status = 1 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY af.updated_at DESC, af.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_favorite af INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = af.article_id WHERE af.user_id = #{userId} AND af.status = 1 AND a.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, content_text = #{contentText}, content_storage_type = #{contentStorageType}, content_object_key = #{contentObjectKey}, content_url = #{contentUrl}, content_format = #{contentFormat}, content_preview = #{contentPreview}, cover_object_key = #{coverObjectKey}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, summary_status = #{summaryStatus}, summary_text = #{summaryText}, summary_version = #{summaryVersion}, summary_retry_count = #{summaryRetryCount}, summary_last_error = #{summaryLastError}, version = #{version}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1
UPDATE article SET status = 0, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1
